@if (vendor$ | async; as vendor) {

{{ vendor.BillingSubAgency || '—' }}
Billing Fund
{{ vendor.BillingFund || '—' }}

{{ vendor.BillingFundBreakout || '—' }}
Address
@if (vendor.VendorAddressLine1) { {{ vendor.VendorAddressLine1 }} @if (vendor.VendorAddressLine2) {
{{ vendor.VendorAddressLine2 }} } @if (vendor.VendorAddressLine3) {
{{ vendor.VendorAddressLine3 }} } } @else { — }
City
{{ vendor.VendorCity || '—' }}
State
{{ vendor.VendorState || '—' }}
ZIP Code
{{ vendor.VendorZip || '—' }}
Phone
@if (vendor.VendorPhone) { {{ vendor.VendorPhone }} } @else { — }
Email
@if (vendor.Email) { {{ vendor.Email }} } @else { — }
Remarks
{{ vendor.Remarks || '—' }}
Users ({{ vendor.PersonCount }})
@if (people$ | async; as people) { @if (people.length > 0) { } @else {

No users belong to this vendor.

} }
Organizations ({{ vendor.OrganizationCount }})
@if (organizations$ | async; as organizations) { @if (organizations.length > 0) { } @else {

No organizations belong to this vendor.

} }
} @else {
